# Description

Implement this task.


# [PKT-JOB-005](task-0061): Approval Handling

## Purpose

Handle approvals inside jobs.

## Scope

- Approval logic
- State transitions
- Notifications

## Implementation

1. Implement approval logic
2. Add state transitions
3. Add notifications

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Approval logic works
2. Transitions correct
3. Notifications sent
